children.label: A
children.text: the care and maintenance of the grounds; and

children.label: B
children.text: the supplying of all mechanical furnishings and mechanical equipment for the Building.

children.heading: .—Operation and maintenance
children.label: 2 .—Operation and maintenance
children.text: The Architect shall direct the operation and maintenance of the mechanical equipment and repair of the building.

children.heading: .—Contract authority
children.label: 3 .—Contract authority
children.text: The Architect may enter into all necessary contracts to carry out this subsection.

children.label: A
children.text: expenses of heating and air-conditioning refrigeration supplied by the Capitol Power Plant, advancements for which shall be made and deposited in the Treasury to the credit of appropriations provided for the Capitol Power Plant; and

children.label: B
children.text: the purchase of electrical energy; and

children.label: A
children.text: improvements, maintenance, repairs, equipment, supplies, materials, and appurtenances;

children.label: C
children.text: personal and other services (including temporary labor without regard to chapter 51, subchapter III of chapter 53, and subchapter III of chapter 83, of title 5); and

children.label: i
children.text: for snow removal (by hire of personnel and equipment or under contract); and

children.label: ii
children.text: for the replacement of electrical transformers containing polychlorinated biphenyls.
